positive: A symmetrical, central composition of a stylized celestial forest scene featuring bioluminescent fauna and flora. The main subject is a highly detailed, glowing crescent moon surrounded by abstract, geometrically patterned leaves and stylized mountain silhouettes. Use a restricted, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant turquoise, and electric yellow-gold for accents. The style must be a clean, flat vector illustration mixed with neo-art deco etching techniques. Emphasize crisp lines, sharp contrast, and clean, printable silhouettes suitable for apparel textile printing. Concept: Mythic nocturnal ecosystem.
